title: disteganthus calatheoides
intro: Disteganthus calatheoides, also known as the "False Calathea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. The medicinal properties of Disteganthus calatheoides are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce the risk of infection. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Disteganthus calatheoides can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
